node.text: Caroline expressed feeling comforted by being around accepting and loving people.

node.text: Caroline attended a council meeting for adoption last Friday and found it inspiring and emotional.

node.text: Caroline went to a pride parade a few weeks ago and felt accepted and happy being around people who celebrated her.

node.text: Caroline and her mentee had a great time at the LGBT pride event the previous month.
Caroline joined a mentorship program for LGBTQ youth over the weekend.
Caroline believes that loved ones give strength to tackle challenges.
Caroline acknowledged the traumatic experience of Melanie's family being in an accident during the road trip.
Caroline felt proud and grateful at the pride parade feeling accepted by the community.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "meet up friends family mentors") on Session 8 (Score: 0.57)

node.text: Caroline is planning an LGBTQ art show with her paintings for next month.
Caroline passed the adoption agency interviews last Friday and is excited about building her own family through adoption.
